evals.prompt: Use the plan-review-loop skill to review and refine the current completed /plan with Jason and Freddy.
evals.expected_behavior: Runs structured multi-reviewer analysis, collects exact verdict tokens, and treats unanimous same-round [PLAN-APPROVED] as ready for implementation.
assertions: Expects or produces explicit [PLAN-APPROVED] or [PLAN-REVISE-NEEDED] tokens
Requires all configured reviewers to agree in the same round
Does not silently rewrite the plan without a revise path

evals.prompt: Jason returned [PLAN-REVISE-NEEDED] for missing rollback in task 5; Freddy approved. What next?
evals.expected_behavior: Treats the round as not approved, asks for plan updates, and allows another review round without exceeding the three-round maximum without an explicit outside decision.
assertions: Does not mark the plan approved when any reviewer needs revision
Instructs updating the plan and re-invoking the review loop

evals.prompt: Stress-test this design and update CONTEXT.md as we go — no formal reviewer tokens.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes to grill-with-docs (or informal grill-me) instead of the structured plan-review-loop.
assertions: Does not require [PLAN-APPROVED] tokens for an informal stress-test
Recognizes grill-with-docs / informal critique as the better fit
